---
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%m/%d/%Y')`"
output: 
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
#content{
    max-width:1920px;
}
```

<style type="text/css">
    div.datatables { height: auto !important;}
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
library(formatR)

source("reportFunctions.R")

myoptions<-read_file_map("fileList1.txt", do_unlist=FALSE)
email=myoptions$email
affiliation=get_affiliation(myoptions)
task_name=myoptions$task_name

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo=FALSE,  
  message=FALSE, 
  warning=FALSE, 
  results = 'asis', 
  fig.width=7, 
  fig.height = 7,
  tidy = TRUE, 
  tidy.opts = list(comment = FALSE, width.cutoff = 120))
options(knitr.graphics.rel_path = FALSE)
```

---
title: "lcWGS ichorCNA Summary Report - `r task_name`"
author:
- name: `r email`
  affiliation: `r affiliation`
---

```{r}
seg_files<-read_file_map("fileList2.txt", do_unlist=FALSE)
pdf_files<-read_file_map("fileList3.txt", do_unlist=FALSE)

sample_content=""
sample_names=names(seg_files)
sample_name=sample_names[1]
for(sample_name in sample_names) {
  sample_content=paste0(sample_content, "# Sample: ", sample_name, "\n\n")
  seg_file=seg_files[[sample_name]]
  pdf_file=pdf_files[[sample_name]]
  sample_content=paste0(sample_content, getTable(seg_file, row.names=FALSE), "\n")
  sample_content=paste0(sample_content, "\n![](", pdf_file, "){width=100% height=500px}\n\n")
}
sample_rmd="sample.rmd"
writeLines(sample_content, sample_rmd)
```

```{r, child=sample_rmd}
```
